mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEM_PRED_NUM (round_no, member_no, pred_num, submit_at) VALUES (#{roundNo}, #{memberNo}, #{predNum}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_PRED_NUM WHERE round_no = #{roundNo}
SELECT ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN hit_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) FROM MEM_PRED_NUM WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)

SELECT r.ROUND_NO AS roundNo, r.ROUND_DATE AS roundDate, r.NUM1 AS num1, r.NUM2 AS num2, r.NUM3 AS num3, r.NUM4 AS num4, r.NUM5 AS num5, r.NUM6 AS num6, r.BONUS_NUM AS bonusNum, p.pred_num AS predNum, p.hit_yn AS hitYn, p.submit_at AS submitAt FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT r LEFT JOIN MEM_PRED_NUM p ON r.ROUND_NO = p.round_no AND p.member_no = #{memberNo} LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO j ON j.member_no = #{memberNo} WHERE j.create_ts <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(r.round_date, ' 19:00:00'), '%Y%m%d %H:%i:%s') ORDER BY r.ROUND_NO DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_PRED_NUM WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) + 1 FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)

SELECT p.pred_num AS predNum, COUNT(*) AS memberCnt, GROUP_CONCAT( CASE WHEN r.ranking IS NULL THEN 'NEW' ELSE CAST(r.ranking AS CHAR) END ORDER BY r.ranking ASC SEPARATOR ',' ) AS rankings FROM MEM_PRED_NUM p LEFT JOIN MEM_RANK_ALL r ON r.member_no = p.member_no AND r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) WHERE p.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) + 1 FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)
AND r.ranking IS NOT NULL AND r.ranking <= #{rankVal}
AND r.ranking IS NOT NULL AND r.ranking <= (SELECT CEIL(c * #{rankVal} / 100.0) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM MEM_RANK_ALL WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)) t)
AND r.ranking IS NOT NULL AND r.ranking >= (SELECT c - #{rankVal} + 1 FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM MEM_RANK_ALL WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)) t)
AND r.ranking IS NOT NULL AND r.ranking >= (SELECT c - CEIL(c * #{rankVal} / 100.0) + 1 FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM MEM_RANK_ALL WHERE round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT)) t)
GROUP BY p.pred_num ORDER BY memberCnt DESC, p.pred_num ASC

SELECT p.pred_num AS predNum, COUNT(*) AS memberCnt, GROUP_CONCAT( CASE WHEN r.ranking IS NULL THEN 'NEW' ELSE CAST(r.ranking AS CHAR) END ORDER BY r.ranking ASC SEPARATOR ',' ) AS rankings FROM MEM_PRED_NUM p LEFT JOIN MEM_RANK_ALL r ON r.member_no = p.member_no AND r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) WHERE p.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) + 1 FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) AND p.member_no IN ( SELECT member_no FROM MEM_PRED_NUM WHERE round_no IN ( SELECT round_no FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT ORDER BY round_no DESC LIMIT #{roundCnt} ) GROUP BY member_no HAVING COUNT(*) >= (#{roundCnt} - #{maxNoSub}) AND SUM(CASE WHEN hit_yn = #{hitYn} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(*) ) GROUP BY p.pred_num ORDER BY memberCnt DESC, p.pred_num ASC

SELECT p.pred_num AS predNum, sub.hitCnt AS hitCnt, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.user_id) AS nickname, r.ranking AS ranking, (#{roundCnt} - sub.totalCnt) AS noSubmitCnt FROM MEM_PRED_NUM p JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no LEFT JOIN MEM_RANK_ALL r ON r.member_no = p.member_no AND r.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) JOIN ( SELECT member_no, COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN hit_yn = #{hitYn} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt FROM MEM_PRED_NUM WHERE round_no IN ( SELECT rn FROM ( SELECT round_no AS rn FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT ORDER BY round_no DESC LIMIT #{roundCnt} ) t ) GROUP BY member_no HAVING totalCnt >= (#{roundCnt} - #{maxNoSub}) AND SUM(CASE WHEN hit_yn = #{hitYn} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(*) ) sub ON sub.member_no = p.member_no WHERE p.round_no = (SELECT MAX(round_no) + 1 FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT) ORDER BY sub.hitCnt DESC, p.pred_num ASC, (r.ranking IS NULL) ASC, r.ranking ASC
